uninstallPage.deleteData: Also &delete user data from AppData (this action cannot be undone)
uninstallPage.description:
Uninstalling {productName} will remove all application files.

You can optionally also delete your personal data (settings, known hosts, SSH keys, etc.) stored in AppData.

windowsIntegrationPage.contextMenu: Add Open terminal in Cosmosh to folder right-click menu
windowsIntegrationPage.label: Windows integration (optional):
windowsIntegrationPage.terminalApp: Register Cosmosh as a terminal launcher app (App Paths)
